title: cyclosorus burundensis
intro: Cyclosorus burundensis, also known as Burundi lady fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is a type of fern that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus burundensis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, while also providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Cyclosorus burundensis can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
